notes: To get the Glyph launcher to work, edit the GlyphLibrary.xml file, which can be found in Trove/Library/. Set minOS to xp. For example, <MinOS>xp</MinOS>. Finally right click the file, click properties, permissions tab, and set all three access to read-only. I had to run the game a couple times to get it to fully launch but it worked fine after that. I set my video settings to openGL and fullscreen windowed. The game will freak out a little bit, when changing to OpenGL and the window type, but will start working normally. Try ending the Trove.exe process if it ever doesn't work properly.
title: Trove

notes: Works after changing the value of MinOS in Library/GlyphLibrary.xml to "winxp". Could not get neither xbox360 nor xboxone gamepads to work, not sure the game is suppose to support them though.

title: Trove

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: As others stated, the minimum os version needs to be changed. After that, in my case glyph updates fail, but you can manually install glyph into another prefix, update it, and copy the .exe files over into Trove's files. Not optimal, but it works. Could probably hardlink the glyph files to make updates smoother, I just haven't tried that. After doing so, the game runs perfectly. On my system I can run on ultra and framerate will vary between 50 and 120 fps depending on clutter. Alt+tab works for me, though sometimes you have to switch windows three or four times to get it to come back properly.
title: Trove

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: As others have stated, I had to change the Minimum OS version in the file at Library/GlyphLibrary.xml and lock it to read-only. After that, it seems to run perfectly. Updates seem to work, but I am not sure. Alt-TAB also works for me. I haven't experienced any graphical glitches.
title: Trove

notes:
I highly recommend to switch the rendering from DirectX to openGL, It's just better.
Also Alt + Tab worked for me but I don't recommend putting songs or videos in the background, it makes the game a bit luggy. Except that, everything is fine (It will tell you need at least windows vista to run the game but that's okay).
